artPrompt: Night confrontation page, no text. Crown courier offers bright shard; Elara shields egg; wrong gold light vs soft egg cyan. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: A stranger offered a crown-shard for the egg — bright, legal-looking, wrong.

lines.speaker: Crown courier
lines.text: Name a price. The realm will keep it safer than mud.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: If safety needs a price, it is already theft.
